allow: PowerShell(python --version; Write-Host "---"; git --version; Write-Host "---"; \(Get-Command dotnet -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\)?.Source ?? "dotnet: not found"; Write-Host "---"; \(Get-Command code -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\)?.Source ?? "vscode: not found"; Write-Host "---"; $env:PROCESSOR_ARCHITECTURE)

PowerShell(& "C:\\Program Files\\dotnet\\dotnet.exe" --version; Write-Host "---"; & "C:\\Program Files\\dotnet\\dotnet.exe" --list-sdks; Write-Host "---"; & "C:\\Program Files\\dotnet\\dotnet.exe" --list-runtimes)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\dotnet\\sdk" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name; Write-Host "---"; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Microsoft Visual Studio" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name; Write-Host "---"; \(Get-Command msbuild -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\)?.Source ?? "msbuild: not found")

PowerShell([System.Reflection.Assembly]::LoadFrom\("$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\PowerToys\\PowerToys.Settings.UI.Lib.dll"\).GetTypes\(\) | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Namespace | Sort-Object -Unique; Write-Host "==="; [System.Reflection.Assembly]::LoadFrom\("$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\PowerToys\\PowerToys.ManagedCommon.dll"\).GetTypes\(\) | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Namespace | Sort-Object -Unique)

PowerShell($asm = [System.Reflection.Assembly]::LoadFrom\("$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\PowerToys\\Wox.Plugin.dll"\); $asm.GetType\("Wox.Plugin.ISettingProvider"\).GetMethods\(\) | Select-Object Name, ReturnType; Write-Host "==="; $asm2 = [System.Reflection.Assembly]::LoadFrom\("$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\PowerToys\\PowerToys.Settings.UI.Lib.dll"\); $asm2.GetType\("Microsoft.PowerToys.Settings.UI.Library.PluginAdditionalOption"\).GetProperties\(\) | Select-Object Name, PropertyType | Select-Object -First 15)

PowerShell($pt = Get-Process -Name "PowerToys" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($pt\) { $pt | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2 }; Start-Process "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\PowerToys\\PowerToys.exe"; Write-Host "PowerToys restarted")
